name: Internet & Connectivity
description: Download/upload speeds, latency, mobile data quality, and outage patterns for remote workers.

name: Housing & Long-Stays
description: Monthly rental prices, neighborhoods, lease vs Airbnb tradeoffs, and gotchas for long-stay nomads.

name: Safety & Risk
description: Local crime patterns, scam profiles, neighborhood-level safety, and government travel advisories.

name: Banking & Money
description: Opening accounts, ATM strategies, currency controls, parallel exchange rates, and remittance options.

name: Crypto & Web3
description: On/off-ramp options, crypto-friendly banks, regulation, and Bitcoin-native infrastructure.

name: Visas & Residency
description: Digital nomad visas, tourist visa duration, residency pathways, and renewal mechanics.

name: Cost of Living
description: Monthly budgets by category — rent, groceries, transport, dining, coworking, healthcare.

name: Coworking & Cafés
description: Coworking space directories, wifi-strong cafés, monthly passes, and community quality.

name: Healthcare
description: Hospital quality, expat-friendly clinics, insurance requirements, and emergency care.

name: Logistics & Daily Life
description: Transit, SIM cards, deliveries, language friction, and the unglamorous daily-life details.

name: Scam Prevention
description: Common scams targeting expats and nomads, reported by destination, with countermeasures.
